docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CARTER,TOMMIE AS TO DEFENDANT MULTI-SERVICE CENTER SOUTH ST.VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIETY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARTER,TOMMIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MULTI-SERVICE CENTER SOUTH ST.VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIETY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,521.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-22-1997, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-30-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 24986, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARTER,TOMMIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MULTI-SERVICE CENTER SOUTH ST.VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIETY JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 24986 ON 4-9-97. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAIL TO RICHARD BRITE RETURNED SIGNED.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT MULTI-SERVICE CENTER SOUTH ST.VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIETY
